bg.name: Background
bg.description: Stage background; full-bleed behind the scene.

fg.name: Foreground
fg.description: currentColor for every sprite, the ground, and the header text.

button_bg.name: Primary button bg
button_bg.description: Background of the Start / Restart primary button.

button_hover.name: Primary button hover bg
button_hover.description: Hover background of the primary button.

button_secondary_text.name: Touch control text
button_secondary_text.description: Text + border color of the on-screen touch controls (jump / duck).

button_secondary_border.name: Touch control border
button_secondary_border.description: Outline color of the on-screen touch controls.

button_secondary_hover_bg.name: Touch control active bg
button_secondary_hover_bg.description: Active / pressed background of the on-screen touch controls.

focus_ring.name: Focus ring
focus_ring.description: Outline color shown on buttons / the stage when keyboard focus enters.

sprite_runner_idle.name: Runner: idle
sprite_runner_idle.description: Standing runner shown on the start screen. currentColor drives the tint.

sprite_runner_run_1.name: Runner: run frame 1
sprite_runner_run_1.description: First running frame (legs alternate with frame 2).

sprite_runner_jump.name: Runner: jump
sprite_runner_jump.description: Airborne runner shown during a jump.

sprite_runner_duck_1.name: Runner: duck frame 1
sprite_runner_duck_1.description: First ducking frame (legs alternate with frame 2).

sprite_runner_crash.name: Runner: crash
sprite_runner_crash.description: Runner shown after a collision (closed eye).

sprite_cactus_small.name: Obstacle: small cactus
sprite_cactus_small.description: Small ground obstacle. May clump 1-3 wide.

sprite_cactus_large.name: Obstacle: large cactus
sprite_cactus_large.description: Tall ground obstacle. May clump 1-3 wide.

sprite_cloud.name: Scenery: cloud
sprite_cloud.description: Decorative parallax cloud (shown in both skins).

sprite_ground.name: Scenery: ground
sprite_ground.description: Scrolling ground strip. Tiles seamlessly at 600 logical units wide.

sprite_restart.name: Restart icon
sprite_restart.description: Reload icon shown on the restart button.

sprite_sound_on.name: Sound-on icon
sprite_sound_on.description: Speaker icon shown on the sound toggle when sound is on.

sprite_sound_off.name: Sound-off icon
sprite_sound_off.description: Muted-speaker icon shown on the sound toggle when sound is off.
